services.service_name: Dog and Cat Registration and Anti-Rabies Vaccination (ARV)

requirements.requirement: Dog or cat must be 3 months old and above, and healthy
No history of medication or animal bite/scratch incident for the past 2 weeks

client_steps.action: Visit the Office and request for ARV and pet registration.
Present and handle the cat/dog to be vaccinated.
Claim the Certificate of Vaccination.

Cat or dog must be healthy and at least 18 months old

client_steps.action: Bring your pet and vaccination record.
Request for Veterinary Health Certificate for Travel Purpose.
Present the pet for physical assessment.
Proceed to the Treasury Office to pay the certification fee (Php 130.00).
Present the Official Receipt to the Agriculture Office and claim the Certificate.

Bring the animal to the impounding facility.

services.service_name: Issuance of Veterinary Health Certificate for Travel Purpose of Poultry

requirements.requirement: Certificate of Free Status Avian Influenza Type A Subtypes H5 & H7
At least 2 weeks prior to travel date

client_steps.action: Request for a Veterinary Health Certificate for Poultry.
Bring the birds with leg/wing bands, Newcastle Disease Vaccine, and Styrofoam box with ice on the scheduled date.
Submit collected blood and swab samples to the Bureau of Animal Industry in Quezon City on the same day of collection.
Once results are released, submit the Certificate of Free Status Avian Influenza Type A Subtypes H5 & H7 to the Agriculture Office.
Pay the certification fee (Php 130.00) at the Treasury Office.
Present the Official Receipt to the Agriculture Office.

services.plain_language_name: Get a health certificate for poultry before travel

services.service_name: Application for Transfer of Ownership

Affidavit of Consolidation and Certificate of Sale (for Foreclosed Property)

client_steps.action: Present and submit all required documents to the Assessor's Office.
Fill up Sworn Statement.
Pay corresponding fee (Php 200.00) at the Treasurer's Office.
Wait for processing and release of owner's copy of Tax Declaration (approximately 3 days).

services.plain_language_name: Transfer a property's tax declaration to a new owner

supporting_documents_detail.note: Lack of any requirement will NOT be considered ACCEPTED.

services.service_name: Application for Appraisal and Assessment of New Buildings and Improvements

client_steps.action: Present and submit requirements for appraisal and assessment.
Wait for ocular inspection and FAAS preparation.
Wait for Provincial Assessor approval (within 2 weeks).
Receive owner's copy of Tax Declaration and FAAS.

fees.description: Php 250.00 (Sworn Statement: Php 100.00 + Notary: Php 100.00 + Documentary Stamps: Php 50.00)

services.plain_language_name: Get your new building assessed for taxes

supporting_documents_detail.note: If not the land owner, support any proof (Deed of Sale, Deed of Usufruct, Letter of Consent, etc.).

services.service_name: Issuance of Certified True Copy of Tax Declaration and Certified Copy of Tax Map

requirements.requirement: Authority from the owner if the requesting party is not the owner

client_steps.action: Present updated Realty Tax Payment and fill up request slip / request letter.
Secure Order of Payment and pay at Treasurer's Office.
Receive Certified True Copy of Tax Declaration and/or Certified Tax Map.

fees.description: Php 100.00 per Tax Declaration + Php 30.00 Documentary Stamps; Php 100.00 per Tax Map

services.plain_language_name: Get a certified copy of your tax declaration or tax map

requirements.requirement: Authority from the owner if the requesting party is not the owner

fees.description: Php 200.00 (Sworn Statement: Php 100.00 + Notary: Php 50.00 + Documentary Stamps: Php 50.00)

services.service_name: Timely Registration of Certificate of Live Birth (Born in Taytay, Rizal)
services.who_may_avail: Parents, guardians, hospitals, maternity/lying-in clinics, and birth attendants of registrants born in Taytay

requirements.requirement: Properly accomplished Municipal Form No. 102 – Certificate of Live Birth (1 set, all original, black ink)
requirements.where_to_secure: Hospital, Maternity/Lying-In Clinics, other birthing facilities

requirements.requirement: Certificate of Marriage of Parents (if married)
Notarized Affidavit of Admission of Paternity (if child acknowledged – for Illegitimate Child)
Notarized Affidavit to Use the Surname of the Father (if applicable – for Illegitimate Child)

client_steps.action: Present properly accomplished Municipal Form No. 102 – Certificate of Live Birth and all requirements within 30 days from birth.
LCRO checks completeness of entries and assigns registry number.
Receive released personal copy of the document.

services.plain_language_name: Register your baby's birth certificate within 30 days

services.service_name: Late Registration of Certificate of Live Birth (Born in Taytay, Rizal)
services.who_may_avail: Parents, guardians, and registrants born in Taytay – filing after the 30-day period

requirements.requirement: Certificate of Live Birth for Late Registration (1 Set)
requirements.where_to_secure: Hospital, Maternity/Lying-In Clinics, other birthing facilities

requirements.requirement: Personal Appearance of registrant or parent/guardian (as applicable)

For Legitimate Child (17 and below): Certified True Copy of Parents' Certificate of Marriage, Notarized Joint Affidavit of Two Disinterested Persons, Affidavit of Late Registration, Notarized Affidavit of Registrant per PSA MC No. 2024-17A, Form 137/School Records, Philsys National ID/transaction slip, 2x2 ID Photo, Government-issued IDs, Barangay Certification of Residency, Certificate of Death of parent/s (if applicable)

For Illegitimate Child (17 and below): Same as above plus Notarized Affidavit of Admission of Paternity, Notarized Affidavit to Use the Surname of the Father, Notarized Sworn Attestation (for children 7–17)

For Applicants 18 and above: All above plus NBI Clearance, Police Clearance, SSS E-1, Philhealth MDR, GSIS Service Record, Voter's Registration Record, Income Tax Return, Medical Records, Affidavit of Abandonment (if applicable)
requirements.where_to_secure: NBI, PNP, SSS, Philhealth, GSIS, COMELEC

client_steps.action: Present accomplished COLB form and submit all required documents.
Conduct of interview with the client/parents/registrant.
Registration after 10-day posting period.
Receive owner's copy after posting period.

fees.description: Free (Out-of-town courier: Php 90–150 depending on location)

services.plain_language_name: Register a birth certificate after the 30-day deadline

services.service_name: Application and Issuance of Marriage License (Residents of Taytay, Rizal)
services.who_may_avail: Marriage applicants who are at least 18 years of age, with at least one applicant residing in Taytay

requirements.requirement: Accomplished Application Form for Marriage License (AML) – 2 Copies
Personal Appearance of both contracting parties
Birth Certificate or Baptismal Certificate (1 Original, 1 Photocopy)
Valid IDs of both applicants (at least one showing residency in Taytay, Rizal)
Certificate of No Marriage (CENOMAR) from PSA for both contracting parties (issued within 6 months)
Pre-Marriage Orientation and Counseling Certificate (Family Planning and Marriage Counseling)
Parental Consent Form (Municipal Form No. 92) for ages 18–20 (if applicable)
Parental Advice (Municipal Form No. 8) for ages 21–25 (if applicable)
Certificate of Legal Capacity to Marry (for foreigners)
Certificate of Death of spouse (for widow/widower)
requirements.where_to_secure: LCRO where death was registered / PSA

requirements.requirement: Certified True Copy of Decree of Annulment / Absolute Nullity of Marriage (if applicable)

client_steps.action: Secure marriage license application form, present with required documents, and both applicants will be interviewed.
Pay the corresponding fees (Php 600.00) at the Municipal Treasury Office.
Attend family planning and marriage counseling (PMOC) every Friday morning.
Receive Marriage License after 10-day posting and payment of Municipal Form No. 10 (Php 2.00).

fees.description: Php 600.00 marriage fees + Php 2.00 (Accountable Form No. 54)

services.plain_language_name: Apply for a marriage license

supporting_documents_detail.note: Marriage License is valid for 120 days from date of issuance, in any part of the Philippines.

services.service_name: Timely Registration of Certificate of Marriage (Married in Taytay, Rizal)
services.who_may_avail: Contracting parties married in Taytay, Rizal

requirements.where_to_secure: LCRO where the Marriage License was issued

requirements.requirement: Request for the Celebration of Marriage in a place other than those authorized by law (if applicable)

client_steps.action: Submit the Certificate of Marriage for registration.
LCRO registers the Certificate of Marriage and assigns Registry Number.
Receive owner's copy of the Certificate of Marriage.

services.plain_language_name: Register a marriage certificate within the prescribed period

Pay filing fee (Php 1,500.00) and cost of certified copies from court (Php 115.00 per certified page) at the Municipal Treasury Office.
Submitted documents are subject to review, verification, and preparation of letter to court for authentication.
Receive owner's copy for submission to PSA Main Office after review.

fees.description: Php 1,500.00 filing fee + Php 115.00 per certified page of court documents

services.service_name: Correction of Civil Registry Documents (R.A. 9048 and R.A. 10172)
services.who_may_avail: Persons whose civil registry documents have clerical/typographical errors, wrong entry of sex, or wrong day/month of date of birth

requirements.requirement: Certified True Copy of the civil registry document sought to be corrected (PSA copy)
Certified True Copy of the civil registry document sought to be corrected (Local copy)

Supporting documents showing the correct entry (Baptismal Certificate, Marriage Certificate, Voter's Registration, GSIS/SSS records, School records, Government IDs, Passport, etc.) – Original copies to be presented, Certified True Copies to be submitted
For Correction of Sex: Medical Certificate from June V. Zapanta Emergency Hospital or accredited government physician
requirements.where_to_secure: June V. Zapanta Emergency Hospital / Accredited government physician

requirements.requirement: NBI Clearance (latest) – purpose: Petition to Correct Date of Birth/Sex
Police Clearance (latest, with 6 months validity) – purpose: Petition to Correct Date of Birth/Sex
Certificate of Employment with No Pending Case (if employed)
Other relevant documents as required by the Municipal Civil Registrar

client_steps.action: Client inquiry and interview; assessment of applicable requirements.
Present accomplished correction form with all required documents.
Pay the prescribed correction fees at the Municipal Treasury Office.
Receive petition receipt; wait for mandatory 10-day posting and 2-week publication period.
Await PSA decision (3–4 months).

fees.description: Php 1,000.00 (Correction of Clerical Error) or Php 3,000.00 (Change of First Name, Entry of Sex, or Date of Birth) + Php 115.00 per Certified True Copy from LCRO
